content: Your remaining balance (<1>{{balance}}</1>) will stay in your account and will be available for use if you choose to re-enable {{aiServices}} in the future.

comment.text: This translation key provides a message displayed within a dialog when a user disables AI services. It explains that their remaining balance will persist and can be used again if they re-enable AI services in the future. The message includes the user's current balance and the name of the AI services being disabled.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'сметка' (account) is masculine in Bulgarian, but the prepositional phrase 'на Вашия сметка' uses a masculine possessive adjective with a feminine noun. It should be 'на Вашата сметка'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Остатъчният Ви баланс (<1>{{balance}}</1>) ще остане на Вашата сметка и ще бъде на разположение за употреба, ако решите да активирате отново {{aiServices}} в бъдеще.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical error in Czech: 'Vaše zbývající zůstatek' is incorrect. 'Zůstatek' is masculine, so it should be 'Váš zbývající zůstatek'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Váš zbývající zůstatek (<1>{{balance}}</1>) zůstane na vašem účtu a bude k dispozici pro použití, pokud se rozhodnete v budoucnu znovu aktivovat {{aiServices}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'saldo' is neuter in Polish, but the adjective 'Pozostały' is masculine. It should be 'Pozostałe saldo'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Pozostałe saldo (<1>{{balance}}</1>) pozostanie na Twoim koncie i będzie dostępne do wykorzystania, jeśli zdecydujesz się w przyszłości ponownie włączyć {{aiServices}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'reaktívno zapnúť' is a literal/calque translation of 're-enable' that sounds unnatural in Slovak and implies 'reactively' rather than 'enabling again'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Zostávajúce saldo (<1>{{balance}}</1>) zostane na vašom účte a bude k dispozícii na použitie, ak si rozhodnete v budúcnosti opätčne zapnúť {{aiServices}}.
